motion.name: lyric-spring
motion.purpose: Active line scale and depth on karaoke stage.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Main actions: Start, Save theme, Play-adjacent CTAs.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 0.5rem; height: 2.75rem; min-height: 44px; padding: 0 1rem; border: none; border-radius: 0.5rem; background: var(--primary, oklch(0.72 0.28 320)); color: var(--primary-foreground, oklch(0.12 0.02 280)); font-family: "DM Sans Variable", system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; cursor: pointer; transition: background-color 150ms ease-out; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: color-mix(in oklch, var(--primary, oklch(0.72 0.28 320)) 90%, transparent); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px var(--ring, oklch(0.72 0.28 320)); }

components.name: Ghost Icon Button
components.description: Toolbar icons: theme toggle, hide video, shortcuts.
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost-icon { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; width: 2.75rem; height: 2.75rem; min-width: 44px; min-height: 44px; border: none; border-radius: 0.5rem; background: transparent; color: var(--muted-foreground, oklch(0.65 0.03 280)); cursor: pointer; transition: background-color 150ms ease-out, color 150ms ease-out; } .ds-btn-ghost-icon:hover { background: var(--accent, oklch(0.28 0.06 320)); color: var(--accent-foreground, oklch(0.95 0.01 280)); } .ds-btn-ghost-icon:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px var(--ring, oklch(0.72 0.28 320)); }

components.name: Text Input
components.description: YouTube URL paste, theme name, artist/track retry fields.
components.html: <input class="ds-input" type="text" placeholder="Paste YouTube, Spotify, or song link…" />
components.css: .ds-input { display: flex; width: 100%; height: 2.75rem; min-height: 44px; padding: 0 0.75rem; border: 1px solid var(--input, oklch(0.28 0.03 280)); border-radius: 0.5rem; background: var(--background, oklch(0.12 0.02 280)); color: var(--foreground, oklch(0.95 0.01 280)); font-family: "DM Sans Variable", system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 1rem; } .ds-input::placeholder { color: var(--muted-foreground, oklch(0.65 0.03 280)); } .ds-input:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px var(--ring, oklch(0.72 0.28 320)); }

components.name: Sync Badge
components.description: Now-playing header: synced / auto-timed / approximate status.
components.css: .ds-badge-synced { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; padding: 0.125rem 0.5rem; border-radius: 9999px; background: color-mix(in oklch, var(--success, oklch(0.72 0.16 155)) 15%, transparent); color: var(--success-foreground, oklch(0.82 0.12 155)); font-family: "DM Sans Variable", system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 500; }

components.name: Karaoke Active Line
components.description: Active lyric with clip-path sing-along progress.
components.css: .ds-karaoke-line { display: block; width: 100%; margin: 0 auto; padding: 0.75rem 1rem; border: none; border-radius: 0.5rem; background: transparent; text-align: center; cursor: pointer; color: var(--karaoke-active-line, oklch(0.78 0.3 320)); font-family: "DM Sans Variable", system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: clamp(1.35rem, 3.5vw, 2.5rem); font-weight: 600; line-height: 1.25; } .ds-karaoke-line__text { position: relative; display: block; width: 100%; } .ds-karaoke-line__unsung { display: block; color: var(--karaoke-unsung, oklch(0.5 0.04 280 / 0.7)); } .ds-karaoke-line__sung { position: absolute; inset: 0; display: block; overflow: hidden; color: var(--karaoke-active-line, oklch(0.78 0.3 320)); clip-path: inset(0 35% 0 0); } .ds-karaoke-line:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px var(--ring, oklch(0.72 0.28 320)); }

components.name: Transport Bar
components.description: Bottom player chrome: seek bar, play, timing offset, display mode.
components.html: 0:302:00
components.css: .ds-transport { border-top: 1px solid var(--border, oklch(0.28 0.03 280)); background: var(--card, oklch(0.16 0.025 280)); padding: 0.5rem 0.75rem; font-family: "DM Sans Variable", system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-transport__seek { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.5rem; color: var(--muted-foreground, oklch(0.65 0.03 280)); font-size: 0.75rem; font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums; } .ds-transport__range { flex: 1; min-height: 44px; accent-color: var(--primary, oklch(0.72 0.28 320)); } .ds-transport__controls { display: flex; justify-content: center; margin-top: 0.5rem; } .ds-transport__play { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; width: 2.75rem; height: 2.75rem; border: none; border-radius: 9999px; background: var(--primary, oklch(0.72 0.28 320)); color: var(--primary-foreground, oklch(0.12 0.02 280)); cursor: pointer; }

narrative.overview: song-kara is a product UI for singing along, not a marketing site. Chrome stays quiet; the lyric stage carries the room. Surfaces read like a karaoke booth after lights-down: tinted neutrals, one violet accent, legible type at arm's length.
keyCharacteristics: Lyrics-first hierarchy on the player route
Single sans family at fixed rem scale
WCAG AA contrast and reduced-motion fallbacks

rules.name: The Lyrics Star Rule
rules.body: Accent color and glow belong on the lyric stage and primary actions only.

rules.name: The No Cream Rule
rules.body: Light themes use true off-white or cool tints, not warm sand defaults.

rules.name: The One Family Rule
rules.body: Do not introduce a second display typeface.

rules.name: The No Ghost Card Rule
rules.body: Never pair 1px border with wide soft drop shadow on the same element.

dos: Do keep lyrics as the largest, highest-contrast element on the player screen.
Do use semantic tokens instead of raw Tailwind color names.
Do use portal-based dropdowns for overflow-safe menus.
Do label controls with verb + object.
donts: Don't build generic SaaS dashboards, cream marketing pages, decorative glass cards, hero metric layouts, or busy landing-page scaffolding.
Don't use gradient text for karaoke progress.
Don't use backdrop-blur on transport bars or loading overlays.
Don't use uppercase tracked eyebrows on every section.
Don't exceed 6rem on active lyric clamp max.
Don't use nested cards for related metadata.
